description_long: This object is a modular shotgun with a matte black metal barrel and a wooden stock, accompanied by several detachable components and accessories. The main body features a long cylindrical barrel, a robust receiver, and a classic full wooden stock, giving it a traditional yet tactical appearance. The shotgun is displayed with various parts laid out, including two blue shotgun shells, a foregrip, a trigger guard, and additional barrel or suppressor attachments. The trigger guard is rounded and slightly elongated, providing ample space for finger placement. The visible components suggest a pump-action mechanism, with a prominent pump handle beneath the barrel. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and modularity for urban use.
description: A modular pump-action shotgun with a matte black barrel, wooden stock, and several detachable accessories, including shells and foregrip. The design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing a narrow profile with the barrel and pump handle aligned vertically.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the shotgun, wooden stock, and all modular components including shells, foregrip, and attachments laid out.
description_view_2: The shotgun is viewed from the rear, displaying the stock and a slim outline of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the shotgun and its components from the opposite side, highlighting the modular parts.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, elongated trigger guard with ample finger space and smooth edges
